texts.preview_head: of a bowel obstruction. A thoracic X-ray initially suggested the presence of bowel loops in the thoracic cavity, and a subsequent abdominal and thoracic computer tomography (CT) scan confirmed the dia
texts.preview_tail: aphy (CT) scan confirmed the diagnosis of a diaphragmatic hernia with colonic strangulation. The patient required urgent surgical intervention to reduce the hernia and relieve the colonic obstruction.
texts.full_text: of a bowel obstruction. A thoracic X-ray initially suggested the presence of bowel loops in the thoracic cavity, and a subsequent abdominal and thoracic computer tomography (CT) scan confirmed the diagnosis of a diaphragmatic hernia with colonic strangulation. The patient required urgent surgical intervention to reduce the hernia and relieve the colonic obstruction.
